utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You will get one .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh yeah ? When ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: All right . I will tell you what .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: When we are 40 , if neither one of us are married , what do you say you and I get together and have one ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Why will not I be married when I am 40 ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_Why will not I be married when I am 40 ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , no , no . I just meant hypothetically .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ok , hypothetically , why will not I be married when I am 40 ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_why will not I be married when I am 40 ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , no , no .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What is it ? Is there something fundamentally unmarriable about me ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_What is it ? Is there something fundamentally unmarriable about me ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Uh , uh .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_What is it ? Is there something fundamentally unmarriable about me ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Dear God ! This parachute is a knapsack !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey . Ooh , look at you , dressy ... dress .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Did you go home and change ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , well , it is an important day . I wanna look nice . Um , has uh Dr . Franzblau been by ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , I have not seen him .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , where is he ? He is supposed to be here . What if the baby needs him ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Rachel , what is the deal with you and doctors , anyway ? Was , like , your father a doctor ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , why ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No reason .
